title: Hurco Reports First Quarter Results for Fiscal Year 2026
author: Na
description: Hurco Companies (NASDAQ: HURC) reported a net loss of $3.468 million for Q1 FY2026, an improvement from the $4.32 million loss in the prior year period. Sales declined 8% to $42.868 million, but gross profit margin improved to 19% from 18%, driven by better product mix and cost reductions. Orders increased 5% to $41.98 million, with strong 18% growth in the Americas offsetting declines in Europe and Asia Pacific. The company maintains a strong balance sheet with $48 million in cash and no debt.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mixed results with both positive and negative indicators. Positive: improved gross margins (19% vs 18%), reduced net loss, increased orders (+5%), strong Americas order growth (+18%), and solid balance sheet with $48M cash and no debt. Negative: declining sales (-8%), operating loss, and weakness in Europe and Asia Pacific markets. CEO commentary suggests cautious optimism about potential 2026 recovery, but current quarter shows contraction in top-line revenue.

title: U.S. Computer Numerical Controls (CNC) Market Size and Share Outlook (2025-2034) Featuring Hurco Companies, Siemens, Protomatic, JTEKT Corp., FANUC Corp. and More
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The U.S. CNC market is projected to grow from $12.16 billion in 2024 to $19.62 billion by 2034, driven by automotive production, reshoring efforts, and technological advancements in automation and robotics.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Announced strategic collaboration with Kawasaki Robotics, indicating growth and innovation potential
Identified as a key market player providing cost-effective CNC solutions
Recognized as a leading company driving market growth and technological integration
Noted as a key market participant with exclusive import rights for tools

title: Hurco Reports Third Quarter Results For Fiscal Year 2025
author: Greg Volovic (Ceo)
description: Hurco Companies reported a reduced net loss of $3.69 million in Q3 2025, compared to $9.6 million in the same quarter last year. The company saw sales growth in Americas and Asia Pacific regions, with improved gross profit and reduced operating costs, while maintaining a strong cash position of over $44 million.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Despite continued net losses, the company showed improvements in sales growth, reduced expenses, and maintained a healthy cash position, indicating gradual recovery and strategic cost management

title: Hurco Celebrates Successful IMTS as Show Generates Excitement Over Technological Advancements
author: N/A
description: Hurco Companies, Inc. delivered a standout performance at the 2024 International Manufacturing Technology Show, showcasing groundbreaking advancements in CNC technology and control systems. The company's new control system, featuring AI tools like ChatCNC™, generated significant excitement and was well received by attendees.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights Hurco's strong performance at IMTS 2024, showcasing its advancements in CNC technology and control systems, particularly the new control system with AI features that were well received by attendees. This suggests the company is making progress in innovation and meeting the evolving needs of manufacturers.

title: Hurco Reports Third Quarter Results for Fiscal Year 2024
author: Na
description: Hurco Companies, Inc. reported a net loss of $9.6 million in the third quarter of fiscal year 2024, primarily due to a non-cash tax valuation allowance and lower sales. The company's orders were positive, with global orders exceeding $52 million, but sales declined by 20% compared to the prior year period.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company reported a net loss of $9.6 million in the third quarter, which included a non-cash tax valuation allowance of $8.2 million. Sales also declined by 20% compared to the prior year period, despite positive order growth.
